note: Fixed: the “Report a problem” option now always shows in Settings, even before you pick a player name. (TT-4)
Puzzle category buttons now show your progress as a count (solved out of total per category), e.g. Win in 1 shows 2/3. (TT-11)
The New report dialog now has a Maximize button (next to ×) that expands it to a full-window overlay, so the screenshot is big enough to read and annotate comfortably. (TT-16)
After you send a report, the New report dialog now closes and a small confirmation appears with your report id — instead of the message being tacked onto the bottom of the form. (TT-18)
Report screenshots now show only the tab you're actually on. Previously inactive tabs could bleed into the image because the capture didn't apply the app's show/hide styling. (TT-17)
The app version (e.g. v31) now shows in the page footer, so you can tell at a glance whether the latest build is loaded or you need to reload. (TT-20)
